official_title: Courts Small Claims Tribunal Order No. 1 of 2021 APRIL 20, 2021 COURT ADMINISTRATIVE ORDERS I, Zaki Bin Azmi, Chief Justice of the Dubai International Financial Centre Courts, Having reviewed— Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004 in respect of the establishment of the DIFC, as amended; Dubai Law No. 12 of 2004 in respect of the Judicial Authority at the DIFC, as amended; (A) The DIFC Court Law authorises the Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts:
